hero.subtitle: I build fast, minimal interfaces — the kind that feel obvious in hindsight. Currently based in Kazakhstan, moving to Saint Petersburg to study Computer Science.

about.title:
A slow, deliberate approach
to fast-moving technology.
paragraphs: I'm Oleg — 18, from Kazakhstan, soon studying Computer Science at Saint Petersburg State University. I care about clean code, clear interfaces, and building things that last longer than a trend.
Frontend is where I started. It won't be where I stop — I'm currently learning Python and the fundamentals of AI, with the long-term goal of building and launching my own products.

sections.contactSubtitle: Open to remote roles, freelance projects, and interesting collaborations.
